## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks from `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behaviour changed.
- [ ] I updated public docs/changelog when appropriate.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private audit output, or generated bundles.

## Notes

Call out platform-specific behaviour, licensing/provenance changes, or known
follow-up work.
